pair.value: LM Review and Approve/Reject Leave Request

Manager reviews leave request details, employee balance, team calendar conflicts, and makes approval decision with optional comments. Based on the decision, the system either processes approval by updating request status, deducting leave days from employee balance, adding leave to team calendar, and sending approval notification; or processes rejection by updating status without affecting balance and sending rejection notification with manager comments.
LM Review and Approve/Reject Leave Request
Process begins when a leave request is assigned to manager for review
Manager reviews leave request details including dates, leave type, reason, employee balance, team calendar conflicts, and makes approval decision with optional comments
Decision point to determine if manager cancelled out of the review form before submitting
Automatically sets review timestamps, manager ID, and decision status for processing before writing to the database
Saves manager's approval decision and comments to the leave request record in the database
Decision point to determine if the leave request was approved or rejected by the manager
Deducts leave days from employee balance and prepares approval notification content
Sends approval notification email to employee with updated balance information and any manager comments
Prepares rejection notification content with mandatory manager comments explaining the decision
Sends rejection notification email to employee with manager's rejection reason and guidance
Process completes with leave request either approved or rejected, and employee notified of decision

annotation.text: To-Do: Create an interface that displays leave request details, employee balance, team calendar, and provides approve/reject buttons with comment fields. Rejection comments should be mandatory.
To-Do: Implement logic to set review timestamp, manager ID, decision status, and any additional audit fields
To-Do: Implement logic to deduct working days from employee's leave balance and prepare approval email content with updated balance information
To-Do: Implement logic to prepare rejection email content including manager's mandatory rejection comments and original request details
